case_title: ERIC LINGCHAO LIU VS. FLAGSHIP STUDIOS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, ERIC LINGCHAO AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP STUDIOS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
